input_prompt: Fetch me the followed_at, follower_id, followee_id within follows where followee_id equals 152; combined with (removing duplicates) Fetch me the followed_at, follower_id, followee_id within follows where followee_id equals 606
gold_sql: SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 152 UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id = 606
generated_response:
```sql
SELECT followed_at, follower_id, followee_id
FROM follows
WHERE followee_id = 152

UNION

SELECT followed_at, follower_id, followee_id
FROM follows
WHERE followee_id = 606
```

input_prompt: Give me a look at the liked_at, user_id, post_id out of likes that have user_id is 153, combined with (removing duplicates) Give me a look at the liked_at, user_id, post_id out of likes that have liked_at at least 1 day ago ordered by liked_at limited to 24 results.
gold_sql: SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id = 153 UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-1 days') ORDER BY liked_at LIMIT 24
generated_response:
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT liked_at, user_id, post_id
FROM likes
WHERE user_id = 153

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT liked_at, user_id, post_id
FROM likes
WHERE liked_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY liked_at
LIMIT 24
```

```sql

    u1.username AS follower_username,
    u1.email AS follower_email,
    u1.signup_date AS follower_signup_date,
    u1.is_verified AS follower_is_verified,
    u1.country_code AS follower_country_code,
    u2.id AS followee_id_user_id,
    u2.username AS followee_username,
    u2.email AS followee_email,
    u2.signup_date AS followee_signup_date,
    u2.is_verified AS followee_is_verified,
    u2.country_code AS followee_country_code
FROM follows f

JOIN users u2 ON f.followee_id = u2.id;
```

input_prompt: Single out all columns within follows and their users
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 INNER JOIN users AS u3 ON f1.follower_id = u3.id
generated_response:
```sql
SELECT

    u1.id AS follower_id_user_id,
    u1.username AS follower_username,
    u1.email AS follower_email,
    u1.signup_date AS follower_signup_date,
    u1.is_verified AS follower_is_verified,
    u1.country_code AS follower_country_code,
    u2.id AS followee_id_user_id,
    u2.username AS followee_username,
    u2.email AS followee_email,
    u2.signup_date AS followee_signup_date,
    u2.is_verified AS followee_is_verified,
    u2.country_code AS followee_country_code
FROM follows f
JOIN users u1 ON f.follower_id = u1.id
JOIN users u2 ON f.followee_id = u2.id;
```
